g.text: Other animals, live and their products
Meat and edible offal of poultry
Sheep, goats, horses, asses, mules and hinnies
Meat of sheep, goats, and equines
Other seed for the oil industry

Value-added (USD) for the raw JRC BioSAMs and for the GLORIA / COMBINED-GLORIA / EXIOBASE / COMBINED-EXIOBASE FABIOv2 variants aggregated to BioSAM categories. Bars stacked by category; ISIC-C (processing) segments are grouped on top and outlined in black, ISIC-A (primary) below. Black line = Eurostat NAMA A01+A03 (nama_10_a64, current prices) for this measure — a primary-agriculture (ISIC-A) reference, read against the lower sub-stack; converted EUR->USD on the same rate. BioSAMs converted EUR->USD via Germany's FAOSTAT SLC rate.
